text: The modernity of the architecture and the text on the wall offer an air of purpose and inquiry. As I read about 'R+D'—development, innovation, and coexistence—I feel both curiosity and a gentle sense of hope. Yet, the glass partitions remind me of boundaries, both literal and metaphorical, that exist in the pursuit of knowledge. It is a space that encourages contemplation, while also reminding me of the constructed framework through which we experience progress.
